LanguageData.AP_PropCategory_Floors.description: Floors that are used for purely decorative purposes.
LanguageData.AP_PropCategory_Floors.label: floors
LanguageData.AP_PropCategory_Walls.description: Walls that are used mostly for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.AP_PropCategory_Walls.label: walls
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Ancient.description: Ancient props that are usually scattered around the map. Note these will not work for the Scrapper meme in VE: Memes and Structures, as they are purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Ancient.label: ancient
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Anomaly.description: Furniture and miscellaneous Props related to the Anomaly DLC.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Anomaly.label: anomaly
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Bedroom.description: Items such as beds, bedding, furniture (dressers, nightstands), lamps, curtains, and other decor elements commonly found in bedrooms.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Bedroom.label: bedroom
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Borders.description: Ground borders to properly demarcate your pathways.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Borders.label: borders
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Children.description: Children props, such as toys, children furniture, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Children.label: children
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Decals.description: Decal props that are set on the ground with different informational data.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Decals.label: decals
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_DiningRoom.description: Items such as tables, chairs, tableware (plates, glasses, utensils), tablecloths, centerpieces, and other decor elements commonly found in dining settings.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_DiningRoom.label: dining room
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Effecters.description: Invisible props that release particles from effecters. Bear in mind these will be laggy, so use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Effecters.label: effects
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Empire.label: imperial
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_ExoticPlants.descriptio: Exotic plants from Alpha Biomes. Bear in mind these are decorative. They don't grow, don't produce anything, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_ExoticPlants.label: exotic plants
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Farm.description: Farm props such as hay and wood piles, wooden carts, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Farm.label: farm
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Filth.description: Base game filth as props. Cradle not included.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Filth.label: filth
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Furniture.description: Furniture that has no gameplay mechanic behind it, such as decorative armoires, mirrors, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Furniture.label: furniture
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Hospital.description: Items such as medical equipment (beds, surgical tools, monitors), signage, and other items commonly found in healthcare environments.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Hospital.label: hospital
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Industrial.description: Industrial props such as barrels, pallets, boxes and containers.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Industrial.label: industrial
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Insectoids.description: Props based on insectoids, such as cocoons and spider webs.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Insectoids.label: insectoid
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Kitchen.description: Kitchen props such as cooking appliances, kitchen furniture, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Kitchen.label: kitchen
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Labs.description: Props found in ancient abandoned labs. Usually quite derelict.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Labs.label: labs
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_LargeDecals.description: Large decal props that are set on the ground with different informational data.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_LargeDecals.label: big decals
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Mechs.description: Props based on mech clusters, or other structures of mechanoid design.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Mechs.label: mechanoid
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Medieval.description: Medieval props fit for a grand castle or a simple peasant village.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Medieval.label: medieval
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Military.description: Items like replica weapons, uniforms, helmets, insignia, and other military-related paraphernalia designed for visual and thematic accuracy.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Military.label: military
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Misc.description: Miscellaneous props that don't fit any other category.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Misc.label: misc
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Office.description: Encompasses items such as desks, chairs, computers, laboratory equipment, whiteboards, office supplies, and other elements commonly found in professional workspaces.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Office.label: office
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Park.description: General outdoors props in a nature setting.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Park.label: parks
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Plants.description: Base game plants as props. Bear in mind these are decorative. They don't grow, don't produce anything, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Plants.label: plants
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Power.description: Props related to power structures, generators, gas tanks, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Power.label: power
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Prison.description: Prison bars, cells, inmate uniforms, guards' uniforms, surveillance cameras, signage, and other elements associated with correctional facilities.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Prison.label: prison
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Recreation.description: Sports equipment, games, picnic supplies, outdoor furniture, and other elements associated with leisure and entertainment.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Recreation.label: recreation
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Royal.description: Crowns, scepters, thrones, royal attire, coats of arms, ceremonial swords, and other regal symbols.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Royal.label: royal
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Spacer.description: High-tech props related to the spacer tech level.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Spacer.label: spacer
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Spaceships.description: Spaceship props. All kinds of vehicles designed for space travel.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Spaceships.label: spaceships
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Storage.description: Props such as shelves, containers, crates, storage bins, and labels, as well as tools or equipment associated with organizing and managing stored items.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Storage.label: storage
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Structures.description: General structures such as fake columns, doors, pipes, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Structures.label: structures
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Temple.description: Religious artifacts, ceremonial objects, statues, altars, ritualistic tools, and other elements representing the spiritual or cultural significance of a temple.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Temple.label: temple
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Vaults.label: vaults
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Vehicles.description: Vehicles props. Trucks, cars, lorries, etc.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Vehicles.label: vehicles
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Workshop.description: Production and workshop props that fit in a crafting environment.
LanguageData.VFE_PropCategory_Workshop.label: workshop
